title: Armored Paws Backport (Wolf Armor)
description: Backports features from the Armored Paws drop
body:
**I recommend using [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport). It adds better versions of these features and more!**

🐾 **Armored Paws Backport - 1.20.1** 🐾


This mod backports the Armored Paws feature, allowing you to craft Wolf Armor using Armadillo Scutes and give your pet the protection they deserve.

**Features**
  
- Wolf Armor: Craft and equip the protective gear using Armadillo Scutes, significantly boosting your tamed wolf's durability in combat.

- Customization: Feel free to dye the Wolf Armor any color you desire to match your aesthetic!
  
- Removal with Shears: The armor can be safely and easily removed with shears
  
- Discover each of the 9 wolf variants (like the Snowy, Ashen, and Striped Wolf) now spawning in their corresponding biomes across the Overworld.
  

<details>
<summary>How to Get Started</summary>
  
- Find the Armadillos: Locate Armadillos spawning naturally in Savanna and Badlands biomes.

  
- Gather Scutes: Armadillos will drop Armadillo Scutes when brushed, or sometimes naturally over time.

  
- Craft the Armor: Use the Scutes to craft the Wolf Armor!
  
</details>

![Wolves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iKsPU1Yq/images/44d8fc7598ac3faf1e4be35f3b93991412e7f043.png)
